acquisition method: In the targeted analysis (priority MSMS list) against the rat data base
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM DTT and 20 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 10 mM DTT and 20 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: in-gel digested with 100 ng Trypsin (Promega V5111)
fragmentation method: The MS equipment has a high collision dissociation cell (HCD) for fragmentation
instrument: analyzed by nanoLC-MS/MS in a Thermo Scientific QExactive Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: A voltage of 3,5 kV was used for Electro Spray Ionization
labeling: the proteomic analysis using mass spectrometry.
reduction reagent: alkylated with 10 mM DTT and 20 mM iodoacetamide
reduction concentration: alkylated with 10 mM DTT and 20 mM iodoacetamide
